name: chess-engine-electron
description: Electron shell for the runner-only desktop app.

scripts.build: pnpm --dir ../common build && pnpm --dir ../chess-bots build && pnpm --dir ../chess-engine build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:4173 && pnpm build && pnpm exec electron .
